01 —Executive Summary

A Protocol You Verify, Not Just Trust

CIPHER DAO operates entirely on-chain — ensuring full transparency, verifiability, and community-driven governance. Advanced AI engines allocate capital dynamically across multiple yield-generating strategies, while the DAO ensures no single entity controls the system.

🧠
AI-Driven Yield Optimisation
Advanced AI engines continuously monitor and reallocate capital across the highest-yielding DeFi strategies in real-time, executing trades in under 200ms.
🏛️
Decentralised Governance (DAO)
Every protocol decision governed by the community. Treasury management, strategy upgrades, and parameter changes all require consensus — zero centralised authority.
🔍
Full On-Chain Transparency
Every transaction, every profit distribution, every AI trade — verifiable on BSCScan in real-time. Proof over Promise is the architecture, not a slogan.
🌐
Cross-Chain Capital Allocation
Capital allocated across multiple blockchain ecosystems and protocols, diversifying yield sources and reducing dependence on any single chain or market condition.
To redefine global asset management by eliminating intermediaries and empowering communities through decentralised intelligence.

Mission

To create a fully transparent, AI-powered financial ecosystem where:

  • Capital is optimised autonomously
  • Decisions are governed by the community
  • Trust is replaced by verifiable on-chain data
02 —Technology Architecture

Four AI Engines. One Protocol.

CIPHER DAO operates four AI engines simultaneously, each targeting a distinct market inefficiency. Combined, they generate stable yield across all market conditions — bull, bear, or sideways.

🔁

DEX / CEX Arbitrage

AI scans price spreads across 15+ exchanges every second. When spread exceeds 0.15% threshold → flash loan executed within the same block (<3 seconds). Zero market risk by design.
~15–35% APYMarket-neutral
📈

Funding Rate Harvest

Simultaneously holds Long Spot + Short Perpetual on the same asset. When funding rate is positive, fees collected every 8 hours with zero directional market exposure. Fully delta-neutral.
~20–45% APYDelta-neutral
⚡

Flash Loan Strategy

AI monitors positions approaching liquidation thresholds on Aave, Venus, Compound. Executes liquidation and captures the 5–15% protocol bonus. Profits amplify in bear markets.
~25–60% APYBear-amplified
💧

Liquidity Mining

AI provides concentrated liquidity on PancakeSwap v3, BiSwap, ApeSwap. Continuously rebalances price ranges to maximise trading fee capture and minimise impermanent loss.
~20–40% APYVolume-driven
⛓️ Smart Contract Infrastructure
Fully deployed on Binance Smart Chain (BSC). Automated profit distribution, immutable and auditable logic, multi-signature security layers. Audited by CertiK / PeckShield.
🏛️ DAO Governance
Governed by token holders through on-chain voting. Proposals, treasury decisions, and protocol upgrades all require community consensus. No single point of control.
🔐 Security Architecture
Multi-signature wallets (3/5) for all large transactions. Reserve fund maintained for stability. All AI performance tracked in real-time. Treasury movements fully transparent.
03 —Investment Structure

Five Package Tiers. One Clear Logic.

Lock longer = higher yield. Each tier has a genuine reason for its APY. The AI can deploy capital more efficiently when it has a longer planning horizon.

📊 Monthly Leadership Pool

  • Distributed to Top 100 Leaders ranked by month-over-month growth
  • Minimum qualification: $25,000 monthly growth in Referral + Binary income
04 —Commission Structure

Six Income Streams — Built for Builders

A multi-layer incentive structure ensures both passive investors and active community builders are aligned and rewarded proportionally to their contribution.

5–10%
① Referral Bonus
On the deposit of directly referred members. Scales with tier: GROW 5% · POWER NEXUS 7.5% · COSMOS & LEADERSHIP 10%. Paid immediately on deposit.
7.5–10%
② Binary Network Bonus
Calculated on the weaker leg. Surplus volume from the stronger leg carries forward — it is never lost.
⚠️ MAXOUT = 300% of package value
5–15%
③ Matching Bonus ⭐
When F1 / F2 / F3 earn Binary Bonus, you automatically receive a matching percentage. GROW: 5% · NEXUS: 10% · COSMOS & LEADERSHIP: 15%. Pure passive income.
⚠️ MAXOUT = 300% of package value
2.5%
④ Monthly Leadership Pool
2.5% of POWER tier total monthly volume distributed to Top 100 leaders ranked by growth. Minimum $25,000 qualifying income required to participate.
$100→$250K
⑤ Rank One-Time Bonus
A cash bonus paid each time you cross a new Binary volume milestone. Cumulative across all 9 rank levels. Achievements are permanent and non-expiring.
DAO
⑥ Governance Rights
Senior participants earn DAO voting rights — shaping protocol strategy, treasury allocation, and the direction of future development. Community becomes co-owner.

How Downline Volume Qualifies for Your Commission

Not all of a downline member\'s deposit or yield counts toward your Binary / Matching calculation. The percentage recognised depends on which package they hold. This incentivises leaders to guide their network toward higher-tier packages.

LEADERSHIP — — Leadership packages do not contribute to any upline Binary calculation
💡
Why This Mechanic Matters
Leaders are directly incentivised to guide their downline toward higher-tier packages. A team of 10 people each investing $1,000 in SPARK generates the same Binary volume as a team of just 2–3 investing in NEXUS or COSMOS. This creates natural alignment between individual package selection and network-wide growth.
05 —Rank System

Nine Milestones. Life-Changing Rewards.

Each rank is a permanent achievement unlocked when your cumulative Referral + Binary volume crosses the threshold. Every new milestone triggers a one-time cash bonus — plus recognition and exclusive community privileges.

07 —Roadmap

Five Phases to Full Decentralisation

A structured pathway from launch to institutional integration, driven by community growth and protocol maturity at every stage.

Phase 1 · Q1–Q2
Launch
✦ Smart contract deployment & audit — CertiK / PeckShield
✦ Initial user onboarding — target 1,000 members
✦ Core AI strategies live — all 4 engines active
✦ Realtime dashboard & BSCScan integration
Phase 2 · Q3
Network Expansion
✦ DAO governance activation — first community votes
✦ Binary Network & Matching Bonus live
✦ Rank system & Leadership Pool deployment
✦ Target $5M TVL
Phase 3 · Q4
Product Expansion
✦ Mobile application — iOS & Android
✦ Cross-chain integrations (ETH, SOL)
✦ Enhanced analytics dashboard
✦ Target $20M TVL
Phase 4 · Year 2
Token & DAO Evolution
✦ Native CIPHER token launch
✦ Full DAO governance — treasury by community vote
✦ Ecosystem expansion grants
✦ Target $50M TVL
Phase 5 · Year 3
Institutional Integration
✦ CEX exchange listings for CIPHER token
✦ API integrations for institutional access
✦ Institutional partnership programmes
✦ CIPHER Visa Card
✦ Target $200M TVL
09 —The Founders

Governed by Community. Powered by Trust.

The CIPHER DAO founding team brings together deep expertise in blockchain infrastructure, artificial intelligence, financial systems, and product design — united by a shared conviction that decentralised finance should be transparent, accessible, and community-owned.

Alex Lim
CEO
Visionary leader with 12+ years in fintech and blockchain. Formerly led growth at multiple Web3 ventures across Southeast Asia.
German
CTO
Architect of the CIPHER AI engine system. Deep expertise in on-chain infrastructure, smart contract security, and high-frequency algorithmic systems.
Priya Patel
Blockchain Specialist
Smart contract auditor and DeFi protocol designer. Contributor to multiple audited protocols with $500M+ in secured TVL across BSC and Ethereum.
Lisa Tran
Architect & Design
Product architect and brand strategist. Specialises in UX for complex financial protocols, making DeFi intuitive for mainstream audiences across SEA markets.
CIPHER DAO is governed by its community — the founding team provides direction and technical execution, while protocol decisions are made collectively through DAO governance mechanisms.
08 —Conclusion

The Foundation of a New Financial Ecosystem

CIPHER DAO represents the next evolution of asset management — combining artificial intelligence with decentralised governance to create a system where capital works smarter, risk is managed algorithmically, and trust is built through transparency rather than promises.
